_comment: Curated allowlist of known-good AI-SDK + popular npm package names, used by the supply-chain-malware floor's S4 (typosquat / Damerau-Levenshtein distance 1-2) and S5 (homoglyph / separator collision) signals. Distance 0 (exact match) = SAFE. This list is INTENTIONALLY small and high-signal — it is NOT a full registry. /sec-kb-refresh extends it over time exactly as it extends the attack KB (ADR-015, spike-09 F2/S4 + the Risk note on allowlist staleness). The OSSF/GHSA malware DB (S8) is the authoritative backstop. Keep entries lowercase, exact npm names.
